column1: # 4 MB flash layout — shared by all four ESP32 nodes.
# v4 archaeology fix #12 added the coredump partition; the 64 KB came
# out of spiffs (loss-tolerant caches that reformat cleanly on first boot
# under the new table). app0/app1 offsets match platformio's default.csv
# so pre-fix OTAs still boot under the new layout.
#   app0/app1 1.5 MB each — dual OTA slots
#   spiffs    896 KB — offline buffer + label cache (was 960 KB)
#   coredump  64 KB  — ELF panic dump; ESP-IDF truncates if oversize
